Episodes.Title: Unaired Pilot
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Ricky Blitt, Laura Prepon
Episodes.Plot: Steve realizes that girls like men with dogs. Hayley agrees to get Junk food for Roger in return to do her homework. Francine puts Roger on a diet. Stan sabotages the school election to make Steve the new school president.

Episodes.Title: Pilot
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: In order to help him get a girlfriend, Stan rigs the school election to make Steve class president. Things go awry when the powers of his new position go to his head.

Episodes.Title: Threat Levels
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Feeling like her life has hit a slump, Francine gets a job as a real estate agent who makes more money than Stan. Meanwhile, Stan, feeling emasculated, gets an idea from Steve to film "bum fights" and make profit.

Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Hayley takes a job as a stripper after moving into her boyfriend's van and being financially cut off by Stan.

Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: After forgetting their anniversary, Stan arranges to have the last 24 hours of Francine's memory erased, but accidentally erases two decades causing Francine to believe she's 19 again.

Episodes.Title: Roger Codger
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Roger runs away after he and Stan have an argument. Once the CIA finds out, they organize a search team in order to find him and bring him in for questioning. So now Stan must either kill Roger or choose friendship over his career.

Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes

Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: In another one of his attempts to one up his neighbor, Chuck White, Stan runs for deacon of his church. Meanwhile, Steve falls in love with Chuck's daughter, Betsy.

Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Stan worships the ground Mr. Bullock walks on, but things complicate once he discovers Bullock has formed a physical relationship with his daughter, Hayley.

Episodes.Title: A Smith in the Hand
Episodes.Plot: Stan becomes addicted to masturbation, and when he is caught by his son, he blames it on television and declares war on TV.

Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
